client_refresh_token.description: Use cURL or Postman with the OAuth 2.0 Authorization tab. Set the Auth URL to https://api.mendeley.com/oauth/authorize, the Token URL to https://api.mendeley.com/oauth/token, and use all as the scope.

name_for_institution.description: The name parameter for institutions search

base_url.description: Placeholder base URL used only to construct the engine runtime before the Tier-2 hook delegates to the legacy connector.

mode.description: Set to fixture for credential-free legacy fixture tests.
